mnemonics: MAPS: Metadata Acts as a Phrasebook & Signpost (It translates data and guides users to it)
keyPoints: Metadata is data about the data, describing its structure, source, and meaning.
It is crucial for data governance, ETL processes, and end-user navigation and understanding.
Types include technical metadata (ETL details), business metadata (definitions), and operational metadata (usage stats).
commonMistakes: Treating metadata as an afterthought rather than a core component of the warehouse architecture.
Failing to maintain and update metadata, causing it to become stale and unreliable.
